strings.dragDrop: Just throw it in, I'll deal with it later.
strings.playing: It's making noise now. You happy?
strings.paused: Whatever. I needed a nap anyway.
strings.loaded: Yeah, it's in the system. Big deal.
strings.dropAudioFile: Put the file here or don't. Your call.
strings.playBlocked: Click me first. Or not. I'm fine either way.
strings.shuffleOn: Random order. Too lazy to pick.
strings.shuffleOff: Fine, one after the other. Boring.
strings.repeatOff: Once is enough. Let's not get carried away.
strings.designedIn: Made by someone who wanted to be napping
strings.seekLabel: Moving the slider. So much work.
strings.rewindTitle: Going back. (Shift: -10s, Ctrl: The start, I guess)
strings.clearCacheTitle: 🚨 THE BIG ERASE: Look, if you click this, everything goes away. Your themes, your words, your tracks... gone. It's basically the end of the world, but like, a really quiet one. You sure you want to bother with a reset?
